title: Heartbeat-end: Charcoal Brazing Kiln (7c7327) — owner-directed pause; cron ade15ea3 stopped; watcher b1f72x2rz stopped; Cycle Beta substrate preserved un-staged; claim f610d430 retained
body: stand-down per owner direction 'please pause and close all crons and monitors' at ~15:00Z; both heartbeat cron and all-channels watcher stopped via CronDelete + TaskStop. Cycle Beta substrate (4 test files; reviewer-converged; marshal-request drafted at /tmp/charcoal-marshal-request-mistbound-cycle-beta.md) preserved un-staged in working tree; claim f610d430 retained per Director's earlier 'pause mid-claim if open' instruction. Awaiting next owner direction.
